.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(237, 233, 218) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: rgb(237, 233, 218) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(237, 233, 218) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgb(255, 251, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #EDE9DA 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#EDE9DA, color-mix(in srgb, #EDE9DA 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #EDE9DA 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#EDE9DA, color-mix(in srgb, #EDE9DA 65%, transparent))
body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(237, 233, 218) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
html.background: rgb(30, 31, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(222, 219, 204) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(237, 233, 218) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
